title: A bug where an exception occurs even though it is a query with normal syntax (Merge Table)
description: An error occurs in the case of a merge table that contain remote tables. When executing a select query with the same column name and alias
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (1, 'Item A', 10.5);
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, value) VALUES (2, 'Item B', NULL);
SELECT id AS identifier, name AS identifier_name, value FROM test_table ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT id AS id_value, name AS name_value, value AS value_value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Exception on select query with same column name and alias
